summary: Iteration 3 testing — backend & frontend. Backend: 47/47 pytest tests passing including 13 new tests covering iteration-3 features (profile new fields & completeness rules, server-computed resume_score, slot start_at/end_at validation + overlap rejection + adjacent-allowed, /jobs applied flag annotation, /applications/pool RBAC + student-profile hydration, full interview flow updates interviews_attended). Frontend: signup screen confirmed shows 'I\u2019m a Job Seeker'; student profile screen — education Picker opens with B.Tech/Degree/M.Tech/MBA/Others, picking 'Others' reveals profile-education-details input; preferred-role Picker reveals profile-years-exp when 'Experienced' chosen; resume tab toggle (Upload file / Paste link) switches the input correctly; resume-score is displayed read-only (0/100 for empty profile). Static code verification confirmed: student/jobs.tsx renders an appliedPill when j.applied is true; professional/slots.tsx posts {start_at,end_at} with overlap UX copy; professional/refer.tsx shows candidate cards with resume score and 'Refer for a job' modal that fetches open jobs. Pre-existing legacy tests using `scheduled_at` and a client-set `resume_score=78` were updated to the new contract.

issues: Console emits repeated React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' Migrate shadow* style props (theme/tokens or Card) to boxShadow.
Picker uses deprecated props.pointerEvents — switch to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: (Optional polish) Replace `shadow*` RN style props with `boxShadow` in /app/frontend/src/theme/tokens.ts (and any Card/Screen consuming them) to silence RN-Web deprecation warnings.
(Optional polish) In Picker.tsx, move `pointerEvents` from a prop to `style.pointerEvents`.
(Code health) /app/backend/server.py is 1198 lines — consider splitting into routers (auth, profile, jobs, interviews, referrals, wallet, admin).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is monolithic (~1200 lines). Acceptable for MVP but should be modularised soon.
Resume score formula is implicit; consider exposing the breakdown in the /auth/me response so the UI can show 'why your score is X'.
Overlap detection currently scans all slots for the pro in Python; for scale, use a Mongo range query with index on {host_id, start_at}.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_referme_api.py (updated legacy slot test + profile test to iteration-3 contract; added 13 new iteration-3 tests under TestProfileIteration3, TestSlotIteration3, TestJobsAppliedFlag, TestApplicationsPool)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on probed flows (signup label, profile dropdowns w/ conditional fields, resume tab toggle, resume score display)

seed_data_creation: Each test class self-seeds via signup+verify-otp fixtures; demo employer/jobs are auto-seeded by backend startup. Test users are throwaway (random emails).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend session-level fixtures live in /app/backend/tests/conftest.py. Slot model now uses start_at/end_at; backend still emits scheduled_at as alias for back-compat. profile_complete requires education + passed_out_year + current_location + preferred_role + skills + (resume_base64 OR resume_link); conditionals: education==Others -> education_details; preferred_role==experienced -> years_of_experience. resume_score is server-computed; client-supplied resume_score is ignored. /applications/pool is professional-only (403 for student & employer).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in iteration 3 features.
